title: Monty Sheldon
content:
{{Top|rwp}}
'''Monty Sheldon''' is an artist who inked the [[Jabba the Hutt: The Art of the Deal|''Jabba the Hutt'']] comics and pencilled the early ''[[Classic Star Wars]]''.

{{Artist-stub}}

==Contributions==
*''[[Jabba the Hutt: The Gaar Suppoon Hit]]''
*''[[Jabba the Hutt: The Hunger of Princess Nampi]]''
*''[[Jabba the Hutt: The Dynasty Trap]]''
*''[[Jabba the Hutt: Betrayal]]''
*''[[Jabba the Hutt: The Art of the Deal]]''
*''[[Classic Star Wars Volume 1: In Deadly Pursuit]]''
*''[[Classic Star Wars Volume 2: The Rebel Storm]]''

[[Category:Comic book inkers]]
